title: IQ Option for Android
subtitle: We’re excited to reveal the NEW IQ Option app for Android offering <br class='hide-for-small' /> Forex and Cryptocurrency trading!

block-3.title: IQ CFDs
block-3.text: Trade on the price changes of the world’s top-performing stocks for a fraction of the asset’s price.

note-1: If you’ve already had the previous version of our App, simply use your existing credentials to log in.
note-2: As it is an online trading application, please be reminded<br class='hide-for-small' /> that a network connection is required.
